idea-plugin.name: OpenCode Dock
idea-plugin.description:
OpenCode Dock brings OpenCode into a dedicated JetBrains tool window that follows the active IDE theme.

Features:

  • Installation, update, and authentication flows for the OpenCode runtime inside the plugin.
  • Communication with OpenCode through ACP (Agent Client Protocol) in a GUI.
  • Structured display of agent output, including tool use, thinking blocks, terminal commands, plans, file edits, and diffs.
  • Review of files changed by an agent, with options to accept selected changes or revert them from the IDE.
  • Audio notifications for important chat and agent events.
  • Slash commands and @ mentions backed by JetBrains project file search.
  • Code selections and file references can be added to chat from the editor and project view.
  • Images can be pasted into chat and previewed inline.
  • Live token quota and context usage are shown directly in the chat input while prompting, when available from OpenCode.
  • Voice input for prompts (Windows only).
  • Chats can be continued in the IDE terminal when CLI mode is a better fit.
  • Chat history supports opening, renaming, deleting, and bulk deletion.
  • Chats can be forked from any point.
  • MCP server configuration for additional agent tools and external resources.
  • Reusable prompts can be saved in the prompt library and inserted into chat when needed.
  • System instructions can be managed and applied to agent sessions.
  • Git commit messages can be generated from the current changes.

Requirements:

  • JetBrains IDE based on IntelliJ Platform 2025.1 or newer.
  • OpenCode uses the JetBrains IDE terminal for some authentication and runtime flows.
  • On macOS and Linux, installing the runtime requires curl and tar.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• OpenCode 1.16.2 compatibility: model selection now reads from ACP configOptions instead of legacy models field.
  • New Effort dropdown for models that support reasoning levels (low/default/high).
  • History loading is now asynchronous and non-blocking: cached data appears instantly while background sync runs.
  • Fixed session loading for historical conversations broken by OpenCode 1.16.2 missing sessionId in session/load response.
  • Fixed history item conversationId mismatch causing wrong tab activation.
  • Updated plugin icons to OpenCode brand.

action.description: Add the selected code range to the chat input
Add the selected file reference to the chat
Generate a commit message with the configured AI agent
